findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "thread.register" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: One-call register: scout + challenge + register in a single request. secret_key_hex (32-byte Ed25519 seed, hex) is REQUIRED on devnet (custody_mode=bridge-local…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
